subhead: Strict mock with watermark, AI-coach with memory, Skill Atlas. Senior IT prep — for those who already have the basics.

features.title: A platform built for objective progress
features.subtitle: Not drilling — strict mock with watermark, so you know your readiness honestly.

pvp.title: Strict mock with watermark
pvp.desc: Solve twice: strict (no AI, Cue blocked server-side) and AI-mode (with hints). Watermark separates 'honest' from 'with AI' — that's an objective readiness currency.

ai.title: AI-coach with memory
ai.desc: 4-layer memory: snapshot · facts · summary · episodes. The coach remembers your context between sessions — not yet another GPT chat.

daily.title: Hone — daily ritual
daily.desc: Quiet desktop cockpit: AI plan, focus, notes with AI-link. Works offline, syncs via outbox.

cohorts.title: Tutor toolkit (free)
cohorts.desc: Student snapshots, AI pre-session brief, shared calendar, library, session notes. No money step in between.

atlas.title: Skill Atlas
atlas.desc: Track progress map. Ranking-proxy curation: link the best external resources (Strang, mlcourse, DDIA) — don't clone them.

podcasts.title: Codex
podcasts.desc: Short opinion pieces (~600 words) bridging theory↔practice. Our voice on interview prep.

testimonials.title: What people inside say
testimonials.subtitle: Names and companies are design placeholders. Real cases will appear after public launch.

items.quote: Strict mock finally showed me my honest readiness. I thought I knew everything — turned out there were gaps in SD.
items.name: Alex

items.quote: AI-coach with memory actually remembers my weak spots. I don't have to re-state context every session.
items.name: Marina

items.quote: Hone became my morning ritual. Minimalist, quiet, doesn't get in the way.
items.name: Dmitri

items.quote: Free tutor toolkit — I can run students without subscriptions or platform tax.
items.name: Ilya

pricing.title: Free forever — Pro for depth
pricing.subtitle: Free covers basic Atlas and 1 mock per week. Pro unlocks AI-tutor with memory and unlimited.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Everything you need to get started.

premium.name: Premium
premium.desc: For those aiming at the offer.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For those running it at full throttle.

final_cta.title: Ready for the interview? Start now.
final_cta.subtitle: Sign-up takes 30 seconds. First strict mock — within a minute.

footer.tagline: Senior IT interview prep through strict mock + AI-coach with memory.
